creator: kontakt@schweppmedia.de
text:
libmapserver.so.2 is missing. 

Package information: 
# pkg info maperver
mapserver-7.0.0_1
Name           : mapserver
Version        : 7.0.0_1
Installed on   : Mon Feb 29 19:06:27 2016 UTC
Origin         : graphics/mapserver
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:32
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : graphics geography www
Licenses       : MIT
Maintainer     : wen@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://mapserver.org/
Comment        : System for developing web-based GIS applications
Options        :
        CAIRO          : off
        CAIRO_SVG      : off
        CLIENT_WFS     : on
        CLIENT_WMS     : on
        CURL           : off
        DEBUG          : off
        FASTCGI        : off
        FRIBIDI        : on
        GDAL           : on
        GEOS           : on
        KML            : off
        PERL           : off
        PHP            : off
        POSTGIS        : off
        PYTHON         : off
        WCS            : off
        WFS            : off
        WMS            : off
Shared Libs required:
        libpng16.so.16
        libproj.so.9
        libgif.so.7
        libgeos_c.so.1
        libharfbuzz.so.0
        libjpeg.so.8
        libfribidi.so.0
        libfreetype.so.6
        libgdal.so
        libxml2.so.2
        libcurl.so.4
Shared Libs provided:
        libmapserver.so.2
Annotations    :
        cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:umn:mapserver:7.0.0:::::freebsd10:x86:1
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 2.14MiB
Description    :
MapServer is a system for developing web-based GIS applications.
The basic system consists of a CGI program that can be configured to
respond to a variety of spatial requests like making maps, scalebars,
and point, area and feature queries. Virtually all aspects of an
application, from web interface to map appearance can be developed
without any programming. For the more ambitious user, MapServer
applications can be enhanced using Java, JavaScript or many other web
technologies.

WWW: http://mapserver.org/

# ldd /usr/local/bin/mapserv | grep "not"
libmapserver.so.2 => not found (0)

# ldd /usr/local/bin/shp2img | grep "not"
libmapserver.so.2 => not found (0)

Replicate error: 
pkg install mapserver
